name: Chicken in a Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Tomato, chopped (or ½ cup drained canned tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or heavy kettle, brown the 2 quartered chickens in olive oil until they are golden brown.
2. Add onion, garlic, salt and pepper to the pot. Cover and let it simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add tomato (or canned tomatoes) and white wine, then cover again.
4. Continue cooking for another 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
